items.name: Hydration builds cleanly
items.spec: `cmake -B shared/design/sdl3/build && cmake --build shared/design/sdl3/build` exits 0. Resolves any missing-source / missing-screen / missing-widget link errors by adding the necessary spec-derived files.

items.name: Dump mode produces a 640x480 P6 PPM
items.spec: `SILENCER_DUMP_DIR=/tmp/sdl3_dump ./build/silencer_design <worktree-root>/shared/assets` writes `/tmp/sdl3_dump/screen_00.ppm`, magic bytes `P6`, header reports 640 480, file size matches header. The harness ticks until the bank-208 logo settles at `res_index == 60` per docs/design/tick.md and docs/design/screen-main-menu.md.

items.name: Composition complete (every spec object present)
items.spec: The dump shows every object listed in docs/design/screen-main-menu.md: dark background, bank-208 logo overlay (centered upper), version overlay (bottom-left), and four B196x33 buttons (centered, stacked). 'Present' here means recognizable in the right rough region — palette / shape / position can still be wrong; this item is composition only.

items.name: Palette correct (active sub-palette = 1)
items.spec: Dump's dominant colors qualitatively match the reference: dark navy/teal background, teal-ish button pills, light text. Confirms the dump resolves through sub-palette 1 (main menu) per docs/design/palette.md, not 0 or another.

items.name: Sprite codec correct (shapes recognizable)
items.spec: Logo and button pill shapes are recognizable, not garbled. RLE decode (linear and tile mode) matches docs/design/sprite-banks.md including the +4 filler and per-tile traversal.

items.name: Text legible (font tile arithmetic correct)
items.spec: Version string and button labels are readable as text — no scrambled glyph internals. Implies font-bank tile arithmetic matches docs/design/font.md and the partial-edge tile width math is correct.

items.name: Anchors correct (positions per spec)
items.spec: Logo, version overlay, and the four buttons are positioned per docs/design/screen-main-menu.md, within ~5px of the reference. Sprite anchor math `top_left = object - sprite.offset` correctly applied per docs/design/widget-overlay.md and widget-button.md.

items.name: Visual equivalence to reference
items.spec: Final gate. The candidate PPM is visually equivalent to /tmp/real_dump.ppm to a casual reader, modulo: (a) the version string content (compile-time difference), (b) any documented animation-phase nits. If divergences remain, they have been categorized in progress.txt as 'animation phase' or 'transient text content' and are demonstrably non-structural.
